Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates a diagnosis of "Lipidoses," which refers to a group of disorders related to lipid metabolism. This diagnosis is a clear indication of an existing lipid disorder, which aligns with the criteria for "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this condition is explicitly documented, it is reasonable to predict that the patient will have a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" coded in their next hospital visit. The presence of this diagnosis suggests ongoing management or monitoring of lipid metabolism issues, further supporting the prediction.
